market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to positive GEX across all expiries; dealers long gamma will dampen movements
outlook.summary: Spot sits above gamma flip in a positive GEX environment. Bearish 0DTE skew vs bullish monthly structure creates tension. Key battle between 25000 support and 25300-25500 resistance zone. Dealers hedging activity favors range-bound behavior.

levels.motivazione: Significant Call OI across all 3 expirations (170+134+72). Positive GEX anchor. Primary structural support zone near spot.
Consistent Call OI in all expirations (102+107+52). First resistance above spot. Confluence with bearish 0DTE smirk.
Highest Call OI in 0DTE (238). Major upside barrier. Dealers will sell futures here to hedge.
Critical inflection where cumulative GEX shifts positive. Appears in all 3 expirations (24620-24676 range). Structural pivot.
Massive Weekly Call OI (345) + Monthly (80). Volume/OI ratio 0.97 indicates active positioning. Secondary support.
Max Pain for 0DTE and Monthly. Put OI cluster (68+50+533). Extreme downside magnet if support breaks.
